term: passambhayaṁ kāyasaṅkhāraṁ assasissāmīti sikkhati, passambhayaṁ kāyasaṅkhāraṁ passasissāmīti sikkhati
preferred_translation: one trains: 'Breathing in, I will calm the body conditioner.' One trains: 'Breathing out, I will calm the body conditioner.'
alternative_translations: one trains: 'I will breathe in calming the body conditioner.' One trains: 'I will breathe out calming the body conditioner.'
discouraged_translations: one trains to calm bodily formations
one trains to relax the breath process
definition: Shared MN 10 / MN 118 body-tetrad training line for calming the body conditioner.
notes: Use this record for the shared body-conditioner training line in MN 10 and MN 118. Keep kāyasaṅkhāra aligned with the repository's body conditioner policy and do not let the line drift back into body-formation language or generic breath-process paraphrase. This is one of the governed control lines that binds the two practice texts together.

example_phrases.pali: passambhayaṁ kāyasaṅkhāraṁ assasissāmīti sikkhati, passambhayaṁ kāyasaṅkhāraṁ passasissāmīti sikkhati
example_phrases.translation: one trains: 'Breathing in, I will calm the body conditioner.' One trains: 'Breathing out, I will calm the body conditioner.'
example_phrases.notes: Shared body-conditioner training line in MN 10 and MN 118.

example_phrases.pali: passambhayaṁ kāyasaṅkhāraṁ assasissāmīti sikkhati, passambhayaṁ kāyasaṅkhāraṁ passasissāmīti sikkhati
example_phrases.translation: one trains: 'Breathing in, I will calm the body conditioner.' One trains: 'Breathing out, I will calm the body conditioner.'
example_phrases.notes: Aligned body-tetrad calming line in the MN 10 breathing section.

authority_basis.scope: Supports the shared body-conditioner training line as a governed control phrase across both practice texts.

translation_policy.default_scope: Use this as the standard English control line for the shared body-conditioner breathing training in MN 10 and MN 118 unless a recorded local reason requires minor grammatical adjustment.
translation_policy.when_not_to_apply: Do not replace body conditioner with body formation or loosen the line into generic breath-process language when the governed practice-text surface is in view.
translation_policy.drift_risk: Prevents the body-conditioner training line from drifting into body-formation language, loose breath-process paraphrase, or inconsistent wording between MN 10 and MN 118.
